arable.description: Arable land — cereal, vegetable and other annual crops

bare.description: Open spaces with little or no vegetation — beaches, dunes, bare rock

coastal_wetland.description: Coastal wetlands — salt marshes, intertidal flats

forest.description: Forests — broad-leaved, coniferous and mixed woodland

park.description: Artificial non-agricultural vegetated areas — parks, gardens, sport facilities

permanent_crops.description: Permanent crops — vineyards, fruit trees, olive groves

quarry.description: Mine, dump and construction sites — extraction sites, landfills

scrub.description: Shrub and herbaceous vegetation — heath, moor, natural grassland

urban.description: Urban fabric — residential, commercial and built-up areas

water.description: Water bodies — rivers, lakes, reservoirs, coastal water
